---
canvas:
  type: new_quiz
  title: "New Quiz — Multiple Choice and True/False"
  published: true
  shuffle_answers: true
  shuffle_questions: true
  points: 10
  allowed_attempts: -1
  score_to_keep: highest
---

:::: {.question name="MC Question" points_possible="2.0"}

Which API does Canvas New Quizzes use?

- [x] A separate REST API under `/api/quiz/v1/`.
  - Correct!
- [ ] The standard `/api/v1/` endpoints.
  - Incorrect.
- [ ] It is part of the Assignments API only.

::::

:::: {.question type="multiple_answers_question" name="Multi Answer" points_possible="3.0"}

Select all true statements about New Quizzes.

- [x] They are assignment-backed.
- [x] They use different question interaction structures.
- [ ] They are identical to Classic Quizzes.

::::

:::: {.question type="true_false_question" name="TF Question" points_possible="1.0"}

New Quizzes are backwards compatible with Classic Quiz question groups.

- [ ] True
- [x] False
  - Correct, question groups work differently in New Quizzes.

::::
